---
title: "kl_diagonal_gaussian"
generated: true
description: "Kullback-Leibler divergence of a diagonal Gaussian from the standard normal."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.gaussian`](../nitrix-stats-gaussian.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:kl_diagonal_gaussian -->
```python
kl_diagonal_gaussian(mean: Float[Array, '...'], log_var: Float[Array, '...'], *, axis: Optional[_AxisArg] = None, reduction: Reduction = 'sum') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:kl_diagonal_gaussian -->
Kullback-Leibler divergence of a diagonal Gaussian from the standard normal.

Evaluates, in closed form, the KL divergence of the diagonal Gaussian
$\mathcal{N}(\mu, \operatorname{diag} e^{\ell})$ from the
standard normal $\mathcal{N}(0, I)$, where $\mu$ is
`mean` and $\ell$ is the log-variance `log_var`.

The closed form for a diagonal Gaussian against the standard normal,
per dimension, is

$$
\tfrac{1}{2}\left(\mu^2 + e^{\ell} - 1 - \ell\right),
$$

which is non-negative and zero exactly at $\mu = 0$,
$\ell = 0$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:kl_diagonal_gaussian -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mean` | `Float` | `...` | — | The Gaussian's mean $\mu$, of arbitrary shape. |
| `log_var` | `Float` | `...` | — | The Gaussian's log-variance $\ell$, of the same shape as `mean`. |
| `axis` | `Optional[_AxisArg]` | — | `None` | Axes to reduce over. Default `None` reduces over all axes. The latent KL is conventionally *summed* over the latent dimension, so pass the latent axis together with `reduction="sum"` for a per-sample KL. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'sum'` | How to reduce the per-dimension divergence over `axis`. `"sum"` (the default, since the per-dimension KL is additive), `"mean"`, or `"none"` to leave it unreduced. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The reduced KL divergence: a scalar when `axis` is `None`, per-sample when `axis` selects the latent axis, or the full per-dimension divergence (same shape as `mean`) when `reduction="none"`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:kl_diagonal_gaussian -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
